commands.command: npm run validate:content; npm run validate:a11y; npm test -- --run; npm run build
commands.summary: Content validation, 18 accessibility checks, 68 unit tests, TypeScript, and the Vite production build passed.

commands.command: cargo fmt --check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml; cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
commands.summary: Rust formatting and backend checks passed.
Android SDK packages passed; the exact NDK r26d revision was accepted from verified source.properties metadata.
Built the universal unsigned release APK for ARM64, ARMv7, i686, and x86_64. SHA-256 09F3D461476D55C35E3916A193C1D5054785D5EEEC51CF4F94D882A9472BAD52.

commands.command: npm run tauri -- android build --debug --apk --target x86_64
commands.summary: Built the debuggable x86_64 emulator APK. SHA-256 508419B72C7930C885E5B883D80EB4945B8896A1B9781950032DC57E1A46B120.

commands.command: adb install -r -t app-universal-debug.apk; disable Wi-Fi/data; force-stop; launch; force-stop; relaunch
commands.summary: Fresh debug APK installed on emulator-5554, MainActivity resumed offline, and the imported Security+ state remained visible after force-stop/relaunch.

environment.network_state: wifi_on=0 and mobile_data=0 during final launch/relaunch proof
residual_limits: The stock emulator image has no Android share targets; prior evidence proves the share resolver handoff and encrypted cache file creation.
